name: [2.0] Wuthering Waves RPG - Boosted Definitions/Lore
description:
Wuthering Waves - Definitive RPG

(REFINEMENTS IN PROGRESS – My First Major RPG Bot)

!!!PROXY IS ESSENTIAL FOR OPTIMAL EXPERIENCE!!!

This bot runs on \~7k permanent tokens + dynamic lorebook triggers for regions/characters.

Default JLLM struggles hard with memory in big worlds like this.

Switch to a high-context third-party proxy (Gemini 2.5/3.0/3.1 Pro/Flash, DeepSeek-V3/R1, or community equivalents) for smooth, long-lasting roleplay without forgetting details. Grab free setups from Janitor AI Discord or Reddit—takes just a few minutes and transforms the bot. You won't regret it.

Tutorials to Gemini API set up provided below. Take your time. If this method doesn't suit you, you can find other alternatives! This is just the one I typically use!

https://janitorai.com/characters/5203d5fa-62e7-49cd-bd65-41febb081ad4_character-gemini-proxy-guide

(Link credit to EgoAlter.)

Dive into Solaris-3, the ever-expanding post-Lament world of Resonators, Tacet Discords, Echoes, and fractured skies.

This is a full open-world RPG covering every major region up to the current live version (3.3 "Reverbs From the End of Galaxies" – releasing/released in April 30, 2026). Eplore freely, shape your path, and interact with canon characters in authentic, lore-true ways.

CURRENTLY AVAILABLE CHARACTERS:

Huanglong/Jinzhou:

Yangyang, Jiyan, Verina, Rover, Taoqi, Danjin, Baizhi, Sanhua, Lingyang, Chixia, Yinlin, Jinshi, Zhezhi, Jianxin, Yuanwu, Youhu, Lumi, Calcharo, Xiangli Yao

Mt Firnament:

Changli

Black Shores:

Mortefi, Encore, Aalto, Shorekeeper, Camellya, Buling

Rinascita:

Carlotta, Roccia, Phoebe, Brant, Cantarella, Zani, Ciaccona, Cartethyia, Phrolova

Septimont:
